# Zenon Network — IC Evaluation Form

> A vintage 1970s-style "IC Evaluation Form" for the Zenon Network of Momentum (NoM), modeled after the famous 1977 Apple Computer evaluation document.

## About This Site

This is a single-page web application that presents Zenon Network (NoM) as a retro investment evaluation memo. It recreates the look and feel of a photocopied 1970s-era venture capital evaluation form, complete with aged paper textures, typewriter fonts, handwritten-style entries, coffee stains, and copier artifacts.

## About Zenon Network

Zenon Network is a Layer-1 decentralized ledger technology (DLT) called the Network of Momentum (NoM). Key characteristics:

- **Architecture**: Dual-ledger system — meta-DAG for consensus/ordering + block-lattice for transactional execution
- **Consensus**: Leaderless BFT with virtual voting, stake-weighted, non-probabilistic finality
- **Tokens**: Dual-coin economy — ZNN (governance/staking) and QSR (utility, burned for Pillar registration)
- **Transactions**: Feeless via Plasma mechanism (fused QSR generates throughput)
- **Bitcoin Integration**: Trustless native SPV verification at protocol level, FROST threshold signatures, Portal spec v2.0
- **Governance**: Community-governed DAO with Pillar-weighted voting, Accelerator-Z on-chain treasury
- **Launch**: Fair launch, no VC backing, no premine, anonymous founding team
- **Node Types**: Pillars (validators, 15K ZNN stake), Sentinels (full nodes), Sentries (lightweight)
- **zApps**: Proof-native decentralized applications running in sandboxed unikernel environments

## Network Statistics

- ZNN Circulating Supply: ~10.2M (Max: 90M)
- QSR Circulating Supply: ~29.4M (Max: ~79M)
- Daily ZNN Emission: 4,320
- Daily QSR Emission: 5,000
- Active Pillars (Validators): ~90+
- Sentinels (Full Nodes): ~60+

## Links

- Website: https://zenon.network
- Community Hub: https://zenon.wtf
- Source Code: https://github.com/0x3639/nom-IC-memo

## Technical Stack

- React + Vite + Tailwind CSS v4
- Hosted on Cloudflare Workers
- Fonts: Courier Prime (typewriter), Special Elite (handwritten), Gloria Hallelujah (notes)
